body: {"success":true,"threats":[{"service":"Lambda","remediation":"Rotate IAM credentials and apply least privilege policy","cveId":"CVE-2026-1002","riskScore":88,"description":"Privilege escalation in Lambda execution role","severity":"HIGH","threatLevel":"SEV-2","detectedAt":"2026-05-22T17:17:21.753Z"},{"service":"EC2","remediation":"Immediately isolate affected instance and update EC2 agent","cveId":"CVE-2026-1001","riskScore":95,"description":"Remote code execution vulnerability in EC2 agent","severity":"CRITICAL","threatLevel":"SEV-1","detectedAt":"2026-05-22T17:17:21.753Z"},{"service":"API Gateway","remediation":"Enable WAF protection and strict throttling configuration","riskScore":65,"cveId":"CVE-2026-1003","description":"Rate limit bypass vulnerability","severity":"MEDIUM","threatLevel":"SEV-3","detectedAt":"2026-05-22T17:17:21.753Z"}]}
